findings.location: s4 (ソースコード(実装方法))
findings.description: The source contains `.. literalinclude:: ./_source/05/W11AC0201.jsp` with `:language: jsp`, which embeds the full JSP source code of W11AC0201.jsp in the rendered document. The knowledge file omits this code entirely, replacing it with only a download link reference. Code examples demonstrating correct implementation patterns are decision-necessary information.

The knowledge file labels the screen as "確認画面（W11AC0202.jsp）" but the source does not use the term "確認画面" in this section. The source simply says "作成するJSPの画面イメージを以下に示す" without labeling the screen type.
findings.source_evidence: 作成するJSPの画面イメージを以下に示す。画面下の"キャンセル"ボタンと画面下の"確定"ボタンを押下したときの画面遷移処理の書き方を説明する。
